name: ovgs
description: Sistema de Gestão de Ordens de Venda - desafio técnico full stack

scripts.build: npm --workspace @ovgs/api run build && npm --workspace @ovgs/web run build
scripts.test: npm --workspace @ovgs/api run test && npm --workspace @ovgs/web run test
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @ovgs/api run lint && npm --workspace @ovgs/web run lint
